name: @mc-test/driver-pixel
description: mc-test pixel/OCR driver (M5 stub) — the universal LAST-RESORT visual driver. Treats the screen as raw framebuffer pixels and resolves semantic selectors by OCR + template matching with OS-level input. Advertises clientScreens/containerGui/screenshot/rendering/typeText/pressKey/chat/command with the advisory `brittle` flag; selected only when no structural driver fits (cost 4). The OCR/template + OS-input backend is not implemented here — it is registered for capability negotiation.
